blockers.description: agents/src/trader/ does not exist. The trader orchestrator, CLI, and schema files referenced in the task (trader/orchestrator.py, trader/cli.py, trader/tools/yfinance_client.py) have not yet been built in this repository. Only agents/src/firefly/ is present.
blockers.resolution: Bootstrap the trader pipeline: create agents/src/trader/ with orchestrator.py, cli.py, schemas/, agents/, and tools/yfinance_client.py.

blockers.description: Outbound HTTPS to Yahoo Finance (finance.yahoo.com) is blocked by the remote execution environment proxy with HTTP 403. curl: (56) CONNECT tunnel failed. All 8 core tickers (NVDA, AAPL, TSLA, MSFT, AMD, GOOGL, META, AMZN) returned no data.
blockers.resolution: Allow-list finance.yahoo.com in the environment's network policy, or provide an offline data fixture / mock API for TRADER_OFFLINE=1 mode.
